results.justification: Training-time perturbation, not inference-time downstream-projected defense.
Attack-side; doesn't propose downstream defense projection.
Pre-computed steering vector but applied at first-shot (source), not projected to downstream location with two-phase trigger.
Triggered defense at classifier output, no spatial-downstream projection.
Adversarial activation patching at downstream layer locations is functionally adjacent to projecting defense to downstream activation location; same artefact and mechanism class.
Context-window activation-level intervention but not two-phase liquid-solid.
Multi-stage adversarial trap pre-injecting defense gradient at later layer where attack manifests is functionally the same downstream-projection mechanism.
